summary: Comprehensive testing of Expo/React Native Swish POS system. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (94.4%). Frontend: All features working correctly. Login, POS with cart, Admin with PIN, Orders, Profile, and Register screens all functional. Swedish text throughout.

minor.issue: Response missing 'status' field - test expects confirmed order to return status field

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning: style.resizeMode is deprecated, should use props.resizeMode

action_items: Fix order confirmation endpoint to include 'status' field in response
Update Image components to use props.resizeMode instead of style.resizeMode
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput, SafeAreaView)
✅ testID attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
✅ StyleSheet.create() used for all styling - no CSS files
✅ All text wrapped in Text component
✅ API client properly configured with auth token handling
✅ Auth context and session management working correctly
✅ Expo Router file-based navigation working properly
✅ Swedish language throughout the entire UI
✅ Mobile-first design with proper spacing and touch targets
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Used existing seed data: 6 demo products (Kaffe, Latte, Kanelbulle, Smörgås, Vatten, Choklad), 1 test user (test@test.se), admin PIN 1234
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Only 1 minor backend test failure (order confirmation response structure) and 1 deprecation warning (Image resizeMode). All core features working: Login, POS with cart, Admin with PIN verification, Orders with filtering, Profile with user info, Register screen. Backend APIs tested via pytest, frontend UI tested via Playwright mobile viewport.

backend_apis.orders_confirm: ⚠️ POST /api/orders/{id}/confirm works but response structure issue

frontend_screens.login_screen: ✅ Loads at / with email/password fields, testIDs present
frontend_screens.login_flow: ✅ Login with test@test.se/test123 navigates to POS
frontend_screens.pos_screen: ✅ Product grid shows 7 products with images, names, prices
frontend_screens.pos_cart: ✅ Add to cart, quantity controls, total calculation working
frontend_screens.pos_payment_buttons: ✅ Swish QR and Kontant buttons visible
frontend_screens.admin_pin: ✅ PIN screen shows on Admin tab, PIN 1234 works
frontend_screens.admin_products: ✅ Products tab shows product list with edit/delete
frontend_screens.admin_stats: ✅ Stats tab shows 2 orders, 1 paid, 7 products, 25 kr
frontend_screens.admin_settings: ✅ Settings tab shows store name, Swish settings
frontend_screens.orders_screen: ✅ Shows order history with filter buttons
frontend_screens.profile_screen: ✅ Shows user info (Test Butik, test@test.se, phone)
frontend_screens.register_screen: ✅ Accessible from login, all fields present
